description: Execute V0.8.5 M4 System-Level Architecture Refactor (Retry): Re-engage an external L3 AI Coding Environment (Opencode) to perform a comprehensive Code Review and Engineering Refactor of the 'headless worktree' and 'MCP context spoofing' implementation generated during V0.8 M4 to V0.8.5 M3, following the API quota replenishment.
scope: 1. Dispatch an Opencode CLI agent to analyze src/mcp-server/src/index.ts, worktree-manager.ts, and bin/agent-protocol-uninstall.js. 2. Instruct Opencode to refactor the code to industrial standards (robust TypeScript types, DRY principles, isolated boundary-check functions, elimination of monolithic spaghetti code in index.ts). 3. Hermes' ONLY role is to monitor Opencode's execution and output. 4. Ensure the build script (npx tsc) passes.
out_of_scope: Strictly NO changes to business logic or state machine behavior. NO modifications to workflow/dispatch.json or iteration-state.json state semantics outside of this patch. Hermes (L2 Orchestrator) is strictly forbidden from using shell redirects, patch, or python to alter the source code directly.
stop_conditions: Hermes attempting to hand-write code patches via native tools.
